title: Resolve Heltec T114 bridge mapping
description: The heltec_t114 bridge fragment has no demonstrated canonical Zephyr 3.7 target. Establish the supported HWMv2 board mapping with verified pins and runtime evidence, or obtain explicit approval to retire the fragment and support claim.
acceptance_criteria: Fragment maps to a canonical target that builds and reaches bridge runtime oracle, or is explicitly approved and removed; static inventory prevents stale support claims.
close_reason: Retired stale heltec_t114 bridge fragment (no canonical Zephyr board target); added to obsolete list in test_bridge_zephyr_cmake.py; files removed to enforce static inventory. Matches io1k reconciliation for FAIL classification on orphaned bridge fragments. Test passes.
